name: colomoto-jupyter

metadata.name: colomoto-jupyter
metadata.summary: CoLoMoTo helper functions for Juypter integration

documentation:
Provides helper functions for integration in the CoLoMoTo Jupyter notebook.

See https://github.com/colomoto/colomoto-jupyter

functions.name: colomoto_jupyter.ui.info
documentation: Display `msg` (interpreted in Markdown format)

functions.name: colomoto_jupyter.ui.info
documentation: Print `msg` in stderr

methods.name: nusmv.NuSMV.check_output
documentation: Call NuSMV and returns the content of stdout

functions.name: colomoto_jupyter.formatters.svg_of_graph
documentation: Returns SVG representation of `networkx.Graph` `g` with GraphViz dot layout.

functions.name: colomoto_jupyter.formatters.install_default_formatters
documentation:
Register default IPython formatters:

- `networkx.Graph` with {py:func}`.svg_of_graph`

functions.name: colomoto_jupyter.sessionfiles.preserve_output_files
documentation:
Make intermediate output files in directory `output_dir` instead of default
system temporary directory, and do not remove them when the script
terminates.

functions.name: colomoto_jupyter.sessionfiles.output_dir
documentation: Creates the output directory and returns its path

functions.name: colomoto_jupyter.sessionfiles.new_output_file
documentation:
Creates a new file in {py:func}`output_dir` using [tempfile.mkstemp](https://docs.python.org/3/library/tempfile.html#tempfile.mkstemp) and
returns its path.
The parameter `ext` specifies the extension of the file;
`tempargs` are forwarded to `tempfile.mkstemp` with `prefix=colomoto` by
default.

functions.name: colomoto_jupyter.sessionfiles.remove_output_files
documentation:
Removes files created by colomoto if `autoclean=True`, and in particular if
{py:func}`preserve_output_files` has not been called.

variables.name: colomoto_jupyter.sessionfiles.CFG
documentation:
Python module configuation:

* `output_dir`: directory to use for saving intermediary files.
* `autoclean`: if True, intermediary files will be deleted at script exit

functions.name: colomoto_jupyter.import_colomoto_tool
documentation:
Import the module `modname` and make it available globally when in IPython.

Usage:

```pycon
>>> modname = import_colomoto_tool("modname")
```

functions.name: colomoto.helpers.layout_graph
documentation:
Generates layout information for `networkx` graph `g`.
It returns a `dict` object, with position and size information for nodes,
and b-spline control points for edges:
```
{"nodes": {
    "node_name": {"x": float, "y": float, "width": float, height: "float"},
    ...},
 "edges": [
    {"tail": "node_name", "head": "node_name",
      "bspline": list[(int x, inty)]},
      ...
   ]}
```

classes.name: colomoto.temporal_logics.X
documentation: LTL

classes.name: colomoto.temporal_logics.EX
documentation: CTL

methods.name: colomoto.types.State.count

Returns a {py:class}`.State` object if there is no free component in

methods.name: colomoto.types.HypercubeCollection.count

methods.name: colomoto.types.HypercubeCollection.simplify
documentation: Warning: supports only Boolean states

classes.name: colomoto.types.TrapSpaceAttractor
documentation: Deprecated

methods.name: itstools.ITSModel.reachability
documentation:
Check for the reachability a state verifying the given state formula.

:param str state_formula: State formula
:returns: `True` if the specified state is reachable from the model initial
    state, `False` otherwise.
:keyword int timeout: timeout in seconds

methods.name: itstools.ITSModel.count_reachable
documentation:
:keyword int timeout: timeout in seconds
:returns: the number of reachable states

functions.name: cellcollective.load
documentation:
Load a CellCollective model from its URL or SBML export.

`identifier` can be:
\- a URL of the form `"cellcollective://{model_id}:{model_version}"`
\- the model URL from `research.cellcollective.org`
\- the location of the SBML file exported from CellCollective

Whenever `identifier` is one of the two first cases, the module relies on
the online API of CellCollective to download the SBML file.
As the API may change over time, it is strongly recommended to rely on
instead on downloaded SBML files and attach them with the notebook to ensure
its repeatibility over time.

With the option `auto_persistent=True`, the module first looks for an
existing downloaded SBML file. If it does not exists, it uses the online
API to download it and move it alongside the notebook.

methods.name: cellcollective.CellCollectiveSBMLModel.species
documentation:
Returns the set of defined species

```
rtype

set
```

methods.name: colomoto.minibn.BooleanNetwork.simplify
documentation:
if in_place, modifies the network in place, otherwise works on a copy
returns it.
if suspect_dnf, try harder simplifications for functions that are in DNF and have literals with
opposite signs in clauses (will make CNF and DNF transformations).

methods.name: colomoto.minibn.BooleanNetwork.make_hash
documentation: compute a hash for the BN based on its DNF representation

methods.name: colomoto.minibn.BooleanNetwork.propagate_constants
documentation:
For each node having a constant function, replace references to that
    node by the constant in the expression of all the other nodes.
Performs simple function simplification.
Modifies the Boolean network in-place.
The set of constant nodes can be accessed with the `constants()` method.

methods.name: colomoto.minibn.BooleanNetwork.save
documentation: Write Boolean network to `filename` in BooleanNet format (`.bnet`)

methods.name: colomoto.minibn._Run.__init__
documentation:
Run at most `k` steps of an execution of given `model` from initial
configuration `init`.

Stops at fixpoints.

methods.name: colomoto.minibn._Run.select_for_update
documentation: Return the sub-sequence of `nodes` to actually update

classes.name: colomoto.minibn.SyncRun
documentation: Synchronous update run

classes.name: colomoto.minibn.GAsyncRun

classes.name: colomoto.minibn.UpdateModeDynamics

methods.name: colomoto.minibn.UpdateModeDynamics.__call__
documentation:
Sub-classes have to implement this method which should return an
iterator (or list) over the states following `x`.
Abstract class for the updating mode of a BooleanNetwork object

classes.name: colomoto.minibn.PeriodicDynamics
documentation:
Periodic (deterministic) updating mode.

It is parameterized by a sequence of sets of nodes to update simultaneously
in order to compute the next configuration.
